articles.title: Delhi Airport Customs Intercept ₹12.91 Crore Ganja Smuggling Attempt
articles.summary: Customs officials at Indira Gandhi International Airport in Delhi seized suspected ganja worth ₹12.91 crore from a passenger arriving from Bangkok.

articles.summary: Th City Police Commissionerate has dismantled a cross-border illegal arms smuggling module, arresting three persons and one juvenile, and recovering a cache of sophisticated weapons.

articles.title: Checkpoint leads to drug trafficking arrest in Columbus County
articles.summary: A man is facing 13 drug charges after a checkpoint led deputies with the Columbus County Sheriff’s Office to multiple controlled substances.

articles.title: Police Uncover Drug Trafficking at Bali's Nightclubs, Arrest 3
articles.summary: The National Police's Criminal Investigation Unit has uncovered the illicit trafficking of ecstasy at the NCO Living by NIX nightclub in Badung Regency, Bali.

articles.title: Two Arrested in Punjab Drug Bust, Heroin Seized
articles.summary: Punjab Police have dismantled a cross-border drug smuggling operation, arresting two individuals and seizing 4.13 kg of heroin. The suspects were connected to handlers in Europe and jailed operatives.

articles.summary: Mobile police say officers seized a large amount of drugs and arrested one man Wednesday while executing search warrants at several homes.
